# Downloaded at deploy time by `ant deploy-plugins` (server_apps/jenkins/fetch-plugins.sh)
# from https://updates.jenkins.io/download/plugins/<name>/<version>/<name>.hpi into
# $JENKINS_HOME/plugins -- replaces the previously-committed .jpi files (verified
# byte-identical to them). Format: <name> <version> <sha256>. Bump by editing here.
